speaker: speaker1
text: Hi , is this Professor Clark ’ s office ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Hi , this is Kalina from your morning literature class .

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , what can I do for you ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I had a skydiving accident over the weekend and won ’ t be able to come to school today .

speaker: speaker1
text: I broke my leg , but it is healing .

speaker: speaker2
text: How long will you be out of class ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I should be able to return by next Monday .

speaker: speaker2
text: Fine . Well , thanks for calling and letting me know you will be absent . I hope you feel better soon .
